text: Figure 5. Characterization of Fc-EL-EVs platform. (A-B) Size distribution and TEM images of Fc-EL-EV and Ab-Fc-EL-EV. (C) Encapsulation efficiency and drug-loading efficiency of Ab-Fc-EL-EV@Que. (D) Western blotting images of CD63 expression in Fc-EL-EVs. (E) Flow cytometry analysis of FITC-labeled CD63 in Fc-EL-EVs. (F-G) Flow cytometry analysis of antibody binding efficiency before and after elastase treatment in Fc-EL-EVs. Data = Mean ± SD (n=3).
heading_context: 3.4 Construction of Fc-EL-EV and development of Fc-EL-EV@Que
